name: GetTabList
description: Generates a hierarchical HTML list of portal tabs with checkboxes for selection. This is typically used to build a tree-like view of pages.
signature: public IEncodedString GetTabList(int portalId, List<int> selectedTabIdList, string treeviewId, string lang = "", string attributes = "", bool showAllTabs = false)

parameters.name: selectedTabIdList
parameters.description: A list of Tab IDs that should be pre-selected (checked).

parameters.name: treeviewId
parameters.description: A unique ID for the tree view, used in generating element IDs and XPaths.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Optional. The language code to use for tab names. Defaults to the current culture.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Optional. Additional HTML attributes to apply to each checkbox input.

parameters.name: showAllTabs
parameters.description: Optional. If true, shows all tabs regardless of permissions.
